HomePage.title: Your Market, Delivered
HomePage.subtitle: Discover fresh ingredients from local markets, delivered directly to your doorstep.

CategoryAdmin.addNewCategoryDescription: Create a new product category for your marketplace.
CategoryAdmin.toastSuccessDescription: The new category has been added.
CategoryAdmin.toastErrorDescription: Failed to add the category. Please try again.

NewProduct.title: List a New Product
NewProduct.description: Fill in the details below to add a new product to your store.
NewProduct.allowedVehiclesDescription: Select which vehicle types can be used to deliver this product.
NewProduct.multilingualDescription: Provide product details in all supported languages to reach more customers.

VendorRegistration.title: Become a Vendor
VendorRegistration.description: Join our marketplace and start selling your products.
VendorRegistration.registrationSuccess: Your store is now registered. Welcome!
VendorRegistration.registrationFailedGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

validation.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.passwordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.

DriverRegistration.title: Become a Driver
DriverRegistration.description: Join our delivery fleet and start earning.
DriverRegistration.documentsDescription: Please upload clear photos of the following documents. Approval from our staff is required before you can start driving.
DriverRegistration.vehicleRegistrationDescription: Upload one for each vehicle type you register.
DriverRegistration.approvalNotice: After submission, our staff will review your documents. You will be notified once your account is approved.

VendorProfile.closingSoonDescription: This store will stop accepting new orders in less than 30 minutes.

AdminSettings.title: System Settings
AdminSettings.description: Manage system-wide configurations, including API and payment gateways.
AdminSettings.apiKeyCardDescription: Enter the API keys for third-party services like Google AI.
AdminSettings.paymentGatewayCardDescription: Configure your payment provider and API keys.
AdminSettings.qrCodeInstructions: QR Code payments are handled by the bank's application. No API key needed.
AdminSettings.payoutAccountCardDescription: Configure the bank account for receiving platform revenue and founder shares.

AdminFeeSimulator.title: Fee Simulator
AdminFeeSimulator.description: Adjust fee parameters and simulate orders to see the financial impact in real-time.
AdminFeeSimulator.configCardDescription: Adjust the core fee parameters for the entire platform.
AdminFeeSimulator.simulationCardDescription: Enter sample order details to calculate the fees.
AdminFeeSimulator.resultsCardDescription: This is a breakdown of earnings and costs for the simulated order.

AdminInvestment.title: Investment Management
AdminInvestment.description: Oversee the milestone-based investment and profit-sharing system.

investors.title: Investor Overview
investors.description: Details of all investors and their current standing.

reports.title: Daily Profit Distribution
reports.description: History of daily revenue processing and profit splits.

DeliveryJob.title: Delivery Details
DeliveryJob.subtitle: Order #{orderId}
DeliveryJob.pickupDescription: Navigate to the precise vendor location (1-5m accuracy).
DeliveryJob.deliveryDescription: Navigate to the precise customer drop-off point (1-5m accuracy).
DeliveryJob.mapAlt: Map showing pickup and delivery route

DriverJobs.title: Delivery Jobs
DriverJobs.description: View and accept available delivery jobs.
DriverJobs.noAvailableJobs: No available jobs at the moment. Check back soon!

dispatchRules.title: Dispatching Rules
dispatchRules.description: Jobs are shown within a 3km radius. This expands to 5km if the job isn't accepted quickly.

DriverAcademy.title: Driver Academy
DriverAcademy.description: Improve your skills and earn language proficiency badges to get more jobs.

descriptions.zh: Test your ability to communicate in basic Chinese for deliveries.
descriptions.ja: Test your ability to communicate in basic Japanese for deliveries.
descriptions.ko: Test your ability to communicate in basic Korean for deliveries.

DriverAcademy.passingRequirement: Pass with a score of 38/50 or higher to earn the badge.

DriverSettings.title: Payout Settings
DriverSettings.description: Manage your bank account information to receive your earnings.
DriverSettings.payoutAccountCardDescription: This is the bank account where you will receive your delivery fees.

main.title: Vendor Dashboard
main.recentOrdersDescription: You have 15 new orders waiting for preparation.
main.allOrdersDescription: A list of all orders from your customers.
main.ordersPlaceholder: Order management functionality will be built here.
main.allProductsDescription: A list of all your products.
main.productsPlaceholder: Product management functionality will be built here.

revenueOverview.title: Revenue Overview
revenueOverview.description: Track your daily, monthly, and yearly performance.

scheduledOrders.title: Scheduled Orders
scheduledOrders.description: Prioritized view of upcoming and recurring orders.

VendorHours.title: Manage Store Hours
VendorHours.description: Set your regular business hours and add any special closures or exceptions.
VendorHours.noSpecialHours: No special hours or closures have been added.

VendorStaff.title: Manage Staff
VendorStaff.description: Add, edit, or remove staff members who help manage your store.

VendorSettings.title: Store Settings
VendorSettings.description: Manage your store details and payout information.
VendorSettings.payoutAccountCardDescription: This is the bank account where you will receive your earnings.

CustomerDashboard.title: My Orders
CustomerDashboard.description: View your order history and track current orders.
